audit_items.proof_trace: No dynamic memory allocation exists in any inline function body defined in cmsg.h. All flagged functions (L664-728) perform only FIELD_PREP bit arithmetic, skb->data pointer arithmetic, or netif_is_* boolean checks — none invoke kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc or any allocator. The nfp_flower_cmsg_alloc function at L742 is only a declaration; its allocation body resides in cmsg.c, outside the scope of this property.
